reasoning: The knowledge cutoff is October 26, 2025, leaving only 5 days until the October 31, 2025 resolution deadline. RFK Jr. initially promised to reveal the cause of autism by September 2025 but has progressively walked back this timeline, with NIH directors setting preliminary dates in 2026. As of September, reports indicated research had not officially begun and the deadline was punted. Furthermore, the market was trading at a highly depressed 3% on October 16, strongly implying no announcement has been made or is imminently anticipated. A sudden "definitive" announcement in the final 5 days is exceedingly unlikely.
batch_queries: Will RFK Jr. find the cause of Autism before November?
